prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.
prompts.storyArc: Tom sets off on his bike on a sunny day, gets caught in the rain and meets Sam at a bus stop, and they end up in a café together laughing over cakes.

characters.name: Tom
characters.description: a boy of about 12, short dark hair, white school shirt and dark trousers

characters.name: Sam
characters.description: a girl of about 12, short straight hair, blue jacket and jeans

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.setting: outside a house on a sunny residential street
pics.background: house facade with front door, garden path, bright sun in the sky
pics.scene: Tom stands with his bicycle in the foreground

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.setting: a rainy street with a bus stop
pics.background: bus stop shelter, street lamp, falling rain
pics.scene: Tom and Sam stand together at the bus stop

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.scene: Tom and Sam sit at a small table with cups and a plate of cakes

prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.
prompts.storyArc: Sofia is walking Biscuit in the park, Biscuit goes missing between panels, and Sofia eventually finds him and hugs him with relief.

characters.name: Sofia
characters.description: a girl of about 13, long curly hair, jeans and a green hoodie

characters.name: Biscuit
characters.description: a small fluffy white dog with floppy ears

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.setting: a sunny park with a path
pics.scene: Sofia walks Biscuit on a lead along the path

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.setting: a street with a brick wall
pics.scene: Sofia stands alone at the wall — Biscuit is nowhere to be seen. Sofia pins a lost-dog poster to the wall

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.scene: Sofia kneels down and hugs Biscuit tightly

prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.
prompts.storyArc: Oliver is nervous at the edge of the pool before his first swimming lesson, then swims across with Coach Maria watching, and finally climbs out feeling proud as Maria gives him a high five.

characters.name: Oliver
characters.description: a boy of about 11, short blonde hair, blue swimming trunks

characters.name: Maria
characters.description: a woman of about 35, dark hair tied back in a ponytail, red tracksuit, standing at the poolside

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.setting: the edge of an indoor swimming pool
pics.background: pool with lane lines, tiled walls, overhead lights
pics.scene: Oliver stands at the pool edge looking down at the water, while Maria stands beside him gesturing encouragingly
pics.emotion: Oliver nervous and hesitant, Maria calm and encouraging

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.background: pool lane lines, tiled walls, water surface
pics.scene: Oliver swims through the water with his arms stretched out, while Maria walks alongside the pool watching him
pics.emotion: Oliver concentrating and determined, Maria proud and watchful

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.setting: the edge of the indoor swimming pool
pics.background: pool tiles, water behind them, overhead lights
pics.scene: Oliver climbs out of the pool and gives Maria a high five
